title: スプリンターズSの後に・キラキラ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono is victorious! The monumental
clash gets a standing ovation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono takes in all the happy faces in the
stands. The familiar sight solidifies her resolution.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She makes a beeline for the runners' tunnel to
find me.
